Restores the balance in the septic tank or cesspool (after its export, after a long break in use, in case of septic tank clogging). Removes odour (bacteria and enzymes process organic waste to produce a liquid that does not smell). One dose every month is enough to prevent complications. items.raw_desc: Pótalkatrész OMRON NB-N101:If you like to treat common colds and various respiratory diseases by effective application of drugs in the form of inhalation aerosol directly into the lungs using the Celimed C-715 ultrasonic inhaler, you will appreciate the spare part in the form of the OMRON NB-N101 nebulizer chamber. The nebulization chamber is the heart of the inhaler, the space where the liquid solution of the drug is broken down into microscopic droplets to form an aerosol, which is then passed directly into the upper or lower airways via a mask or mouthpiece. You can use the Spray Chamber for replacement in the event that the existingmust be cleaned and disinfected to prevent contamination with bacteria or contamination with injected drugs and to maintain the effectiveness and hygienic safety of the inhaler. The chamber must be carefully maintained, cleaned, disinfected and changed regularly, at least once a year. items.raw_desc: Levegőztető TESCOMA UNO VINO levegőztető:        If you want to serve wine that is well aerated, with a developed taste and aroma, then the Tescoma UNO VINO aerator is exactly for you. However, there is a difference if you are pouring red or white wine, because everyone needs a different aeration technique. The manufacturer also thought of that, which is why there are 3 valves stored in a nice stand with a transparent lid, with which you can perfectly serve all types of wine . Red valve with 9 holes for intensive aeration of red wines, green valve with 3 holes for white wines and gray without holes for pink wines. The gray valve can serve as a classic funnel for any wine without aeration.
